subcodes.first_line: O brother, mine of faithfulness and essence of purity, herald of God's Cause, Áqá Mírzá Mehdí of the faithful brethren, a letter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای برادر آن معدن وفا و جوهر صفا و منادی امرالله آقا میرزا مهدی اخوان صفا نامه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @eulogies; reminiscences, @prayer for the departed, @martyrs and martyrdom, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
